title: Allow a formula to use any column from any board in calculations
excerpt: Allow a formula column to use any field from any board to perform a calculation (as long as that field is “calcuable” such as a number, date, time etc.

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml: Allow a formula column to use any field from any board to perform a calculation (as long as that field is “calcuable” such as a number, date, time etc.
